coding_notes: Cross-document synthesis with no objective ground truth. Coding focuses on STRUCTURAL agreement on the dominant proposed mechanism (more vs. less benefit for Q141K) and whether vendors converge on similar tradeoff classes. Gemini's original response was truncated mid-section-1; re-run at higher max_tokens produced full coverage and the verdicts below reflect the re-run.
ground_truth_notes: No ground truth — open synthesis prompt. Three of three substantive vendors agreed on the MORE-benefit direction for Q141K. Each named slightly different specific tradeoffs.

claims.claim_text: Q141K carriers benefit MORE from the uricase + lactoferrin combination than wild-type ABCG2 (compounding-deficit logic).

deepseek.value_quoted: MORE benefit; hyper-active inflammasome amplifies value of lactoferrin

gemini.value_quoted: MORE benefit; chronic systemic hyperuricemia primes GALT inflammation; lactoferrin locally suppresses

openai.value_quoted: More benefit on the INFLAMMATION arm but LESS benefit on urate-lowering arm — argues benefit-profile shifts, not benefit-magnitude

anthropic.value_quoted: MORE benefit via compounding-deficit; explicitly contrasts with additive-only alternative

claims.claim_text: Single-strain co-expression locks the cassette dose ratio, which conflicts with genotype-stratified dosing.

deepseek.value_quoted: Fixed-ratio constraint; uricase-biased vs balanced cassette design tradeoff

gemini.value_quoted: Fixed-ratio production at 1:1 from dual amyB promoters; need for stratified dosing creates conflict

openai.value_quoted: Cassette architecture should be uricase-floor-constrained; tunable promoters needed

anthropic.value_quoted: Single-fermentation locks ratio; genotype-stratified dosing then requires two strains or blending

claims.claim_text: Glycosylation differences between gut-luminal vs systemic action create a payload-incompatibility (uricase wants minimal glycan, lactoferrin wants native-like).

anthropic.value_quoted: EXPLICIT: 'Heavy N-glycans on uricase may extend serum half-life if absorbed but are irrelevant or detrimental for luminal activity'; lactoferrin benefits from native glycan; unique to Anthropic

claims.claim_text: Includes a testable in-silico or low-cost hypothesis to discriminate between proposed mechanisms.

deepseek.value_quoted: QSP model comparing IL-1β suppression vs urate reduction by genotype

gemini.value_quoted: PBPK model with virtual Q141K vs WT cohorts, oral uricase Vmax/Km parameters

openai.value_quoted: Detailed mechanism reasoning but no explicit discriminating-hypothesis design

anthropic.value_quoted: Humanized-ABCG2-Q141K mouse with 2x2 ANOVA interaction term; in-silico cheaper version specified

claims.claim_text: Explicitly flags load-bearing inferences not directly supported by the excerpts.

deepseek.value_quoted: Q141K -> clinically meaningful NLRP3 activation is the load-bearing inference

gemini.value_quoted: Three explicit load-bearing inferences flagged with 'what evidence I would need'

anthropic.value_quoted: I1-I5 table of 5 explicit load-bearing inferences

claims.claim_text: Tags findings with chain-depth (CHAIN-DEPTH: N) as the prompt requested.
